name: Bangladesh Angels Network
applicationPath: Submit a pitch through the BAN site or monthly showcase process.
notes: BAN describes itself as Bangladesh's first and largest angel investment platform.

name: Bangladesh Women Investors Network
applicationPath: Reach BWIN through Bangladesh Angels Network.
notes: BAN describes BWIN as a women-led angel investing network and sister chapter.

name: Startup Bangladesh Limited
applicationPath: Apply through Startup Bangladesh's investment application page.
notes: Government-sponsored venture capital company with portfolio and fund-of-funds sections.

name: Anchorless Bangladesh
applicationPath: Apply for investment through Anchorless Bangladesh's site.
notes: Anchorless describes itself as an early-stage venture investment fund for Bangladesh.

name: IDLC Venture Capital Fund
applicationPath: Contact IDLC through its official site.
notes: IDLC's official site is active; confirm fund-specific criteria before relying on this entry.

name: YY Ventures
applicationPath: Check YY Ventures programs and funds pages.
notes: YY Ventures describes itself as an incubation and investment social business company.

name: Accelerating Asia Ventures
applicationPath: Apply through Accelerating Asia's official site.
notes: Regional investor/accelerator with South Asia coverage; not Bangladesh-only.
